data.title: MiniTales: Cuentos para peques
data.description:
🎁 A free story every day
MiniTales is the app that gives you a new, free story every day, tailored to your little one's age and interests. Stories designed to share a magical moment every night—or whenever you want—without screens, without connection… and with a lot of heart.

🐥 Stories for every stage

🐣 For the littlest ones: short stories, with rhythm and simple words.
🐤 For those who already dream bigger: stories full of imagination and emotion.
🐧 For older readers: deeper adventures and chapters to follow.

Each story is adapted to their development, so that it truly connects with whoever listens or reads it.

✨ Stories that educate, move, and calm
MiniTales is not just entertainment. Each story fosters values such as empathy, friendship, self-esteem, and curiosity. They're perfect for accompanying big and small changes, talking about emotions, or simply... enjoying together.

🎨 Personalize your own story
Want something unique? You can create a story from scratch:
Choose the values, age, themes, or interests
Write or dictate by voice
And you'll have a custom story... instantly!

🎧 Listen offline
All stories are narrated and can be downloaded for listening without Wi-Fi. Perfect for traveling, before bedtime, or for enjoying without screens.

🖨️ Print them to read or color
Each story can be downloaded as a PDF to read on paper or color its illustrations. MiniTales goes beyond the screen and becomes a creative activity, without technology.

📚 Continue your favorite stories
All stories have extra chapters, like a small series. You can save your favorite stories, return to them, and create your own collection.

🇬🇧 Also in English
All stories are available in English. Ideal for introducing the language in a natural and fun way.

🔔 Don't forget story time
Set daily reminders so you don't miss that special time together.

🐾 Start today
Download MiniTales and start enjoying a free story every day. Your little one will ask for it every night. 💫

data.summary: Free, personalized bedtime stories. A new story every day.
data.recentChanges:
Pequeños cambios que se notan mucho ✨
Hemos mejorado el registro y el acceso a MiniTales para que empezar sea más rápido y sin complicaciones.
Porque cuando todo fluye, la magia de los cuentos empieza antes 💛
